title: Morphixia monadelpha
taxonomy: Morphixia monadelpha is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the ice plant family. This classification is based on its physical characteristics and genetic makeup. The plant is further classified within the genus Morphixia, which is a group of succulent plants native to Africa. As a member of the Aizoaceae family, Morphixia monadelpha is closely related to other succulent plants such as Lithops and Conophytum. Further classification may also include the plant's kingdom, division, and order, but the Aizoaceae family is the primary classification.
